original_abstract: SHARE is an international survey designed to answer the societal challenges that face us due to rapid population ageing. How do we Europeans age? How will we do economically, socially and healthwise? How are these domains interrelated? The authors of this multidisciplinary book have taken a further big step towards answering these questions based on the recent SHARE data in order to support policies for an inclusive society.
humanized_abstract: SHARE is a multiday multiculture survey that aims at addressing the major societal challenges emerging from demographic change. What is the European way of ageing? How will Europeans manage economically, socially and physically? Are these domains connected in some way? The multidisciplinary team of authors of this volume have further improved the capacity of the SHARE survey to address these questions and thereby to underpin policy to achieve greater societal inclusion.
